name: Nicholas Sterling
title: Founder & Chief Investment Officer
bio: Founded Nexus Capital 22 years ago pioneering systematic investment approaches. Manages $210B leveraging proprietary research and technology-driven investment strategies across multiple asset classes.

name: Amelia Thornton
title: Head of Systematic Strategies
bio: Leads quantitative investment team driving $120B in systematic equity and fixed income strategies. 24 years systematic investing with track record of consistent alpha generation through disciplined processes.

name: Dr. Steven Chiu
title: Chief Scientist & Head of Research
bio: PhD Physics leading research team of 45 scientists and engineers. Develops proprietary machine learning models for investment decision making with 19 years AI/ML investing experience.

name: Sophia Kowalski
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Equity Strategies
bio: Manages $85B equity fund applying machine learning to stock selection and portfolio optimization. 17 years quantitative equity investing with publications in peer-reviewed journals.

name: Marcus Wellington
title: Head of Fixed Income Analytics
bio: Leads fixed income team applying advanced analytics to credit and rates investing. 20 years fixed income expertise with specialization in yield curve positioning and credit modeling.

name: Chloe Bisset
title: Equity Analyst - AI & Machine Learning Stocks
bio: Senior analyst identifying investment opportunities in AI transformation. 11 years technology investing with deep expertise in machine learning applications across industries.

name: Rafael Mendez
title: Trader - Systematic Execution
bio: Manages algorithmic trading operations executing $210B in transactions. 16 years trading systems expertise with focus on minimizing market impact and execution costs.

name: Natasha Kozlov
title: Strategist - Quantitative Markets
bio: Provides strategic guidance on market dynamics and positioning. 18 years quantitative research with expertise in factor models and systematic portfolio construction.

name: Liam Murphy
title: Analyst - Factor Research
bio: Conducts research on market factors and behavioral anomalies. 9 years academic and industry research on factor premiums and systematic alpha sources.

name: Vivian Chen
title: Risk Manager - Quantitative Risk
bio: Develops risk models for systematic strategies including factor risk and tail risk analysis. 13 years quantitative risk with expertise in Monte Carlo simulation and copula methods.
